# Enes Efe Tokta — Portfolio

> Portfolio site for Enes Efe Tokta, Unity & .NET Software Developer based in Turkey.

## What is this site?

This is the personal portfolio and blog of Enes Efe Tokta, a software developer specializing
in Unity 3D game development and .NET enterprise backend systems.

## Key pages

- /index.html — Homepage with hero, skills, featured projects, blog showcase, contact
- /pages/projects.html — Full project portfolio
- /pages/work.html — Work experience
- /pages/biography.html — Personal biography
- /pages/education.html — Educational background
- /pages/cv.html — Resume/CV
- /pages/developer-stats.html — GitHub developer statistics
- /pages/future-plans.html — Career and project roadmap
- /blog/index.html — Blog index

## Markdown version of homepage

/index.md — Full portfolio in Markdown format
